positive: A stylish, minimalist illustration of a whimsical floating mountain range at sunset. The scene features distinct silhouettes of stylized mountains, gently curved stylized clouds, and a crescent moon positioned centrally. The color palette is limited to deep indigo, burnt orange, creamy yellow, and touches of soft lavender. The composition is highly symmetrical and framed for apparel art, emphasizing clean lines and bold contrast. Style should be a blend of retro modern pop art and elegant line drawing, suitable for screen printing. Flat vector aesthetics, high detail, symmetrical composition, central focus, clean negative space.
negative: blurry, low detail, noisy, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, poor anatomy, extra limbs, grainy, photorealistic, 3d render
